title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 139.200 - Collector may be attached, when
text:
139.200.  Collector may be attached, when. — If any collector fail to make settlement in the time and manner prescribed, he may be attached until he makes such settlement to the satisfaction of the county commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 11094) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9923; 1919 § 12915; 1909 § 11469
